Aku memohon kepada-Mu demi Nama-Mu, yang karena-nya wajah-wajah mereka yang dekat pada-Mu telah menjadi putih, dan kalbu-kalbu mereka yang men-cintai-Mu telah terbang kepada-Mu, agar hendaknya mengizinkan daku berpegang teguh pada tali-Mu pada setiap waktu dan dalam segala keadaan, terlepas dari ikatan siapa pun kecuali Engkau, dan agar mataku tetap mengarah pada ufuk Wahyu-Mu dan dapat menjalankan apa yang telah Engkau tentukan bagiku dalam Firman-Mu.
Ya Tuhanku, hiasilah jiwa dan ragaku dengan jubah rahmat-Mu dan kasih sayang-Mu. Kemudian selamat- kanlah daku dari segala sesuatu yang tak Engkau ridhoi, dan dengan penuh rahmat, tolonglah daku dan keluargaku agar mentaati-Mu dan menjauhi dari apa yang dapat menimbulkan hawa nafsu dan segala keinginan jahat dalam diriku.
Sesungguhnya, Engkaulah Tuhan seluruh umat manusia, dan Pemilik dunia dan akhirat. Tiada Tuhan selain Engkau, Yang Maha Tahu, Yang Maha Arif.Glorified art Thou, O my Lord! I give thanks unto Thee that Thou hast enabled me to know Him, the Dawning-Light of Thy grace and the Horizon of Thy favour and the Source of Thy religion. I beseech Thee by Thy Name, by Whom the faces of those who are near unto Thee have been whitened, and the hearts of those who love Thee have flown unto Thee, that Thou mayest suffer me to hold fast to Thy rope in all times and in all circumstances, detached from the bonds of all save Thee, and that mine eyes may be directed towards the horizon of Thy Revelation and be enabled to do that which Thou hast decreed for me in Thy Book.
O my Lord, adorn my soul and my body with the robe of Thy mercy and Thy love. Then deliver me from all that Thou dost not approve, and of Thy grace, suffer me and my household to obey Thee and to turn away from that which may stir up lust and all evil desires within me.
Verily, Thou art the Lord of all mankind, and the Possessor of this world and the hereafter. There is no God beside Thee, the All-knowing, the All-wise.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my God, my God! We thank Thee that Thou hast guided me unto Thy straight path, and enabled me to know Thee and turn towards Thee, and hast revealed unto me the unity of Thy being and the holiness of Thy presence. I implore Thee by those who are the dawning-points of Thy Cause, the emblems of Thy command, and the treasuries of Thy knowledge and Thy wisdom: Bless the gift which Thou hast conferred upon me through Thy bounty and Thy favour. Ordain for her mother, and for me, and for herself, the good of this world and of the next. Thou art in truth the Lord of all beings, Thou hearest and art ready to answer.

[Revealed for the recipient on the occasion of the birth of his daughter.]
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my God! Dost Thou see me abased, subservient to Thy command, resigned to Thy will, trembling before Thy might, fleeing from Thy wrath, imploring Thy favour, trusting in Thy forgiveness, quaking with the fear of Thy displeasure;

I implore Thee with a throbbing heart, tearful eyes, and a supplicating soul, and with utter detachment from all things, to make Thy lovers radiant as the rays that pierce through Thy dominion, and aid Thy cherished servants to glorify Thy holy words, that their faces may shine with radiance and beauty, their hearts be filled with the mysteries of Thy wisdom, and every soul be freed from the burden of its sins.

Shield them from the shameless, from the wicked and the unjust.

Verily, Thy lovers are thirsting. O Lord! lead them to the fount of Thy mercy and grace.

Verily, they are hungry; send them Thy heavenly banquet.

Verily, they are naked; clothe them with the raiment of wisdom and knowledge.

They are valiant; O my Lord! lead them to the field of battle.

They are guides; equip them with arguments and proofs.

They are Thy active servants; make them dispensers of the overflowing cup of constancy in Thy service.

O God, make them as singers in the farthest gardens, chanting Thy praise.

Make them as lions, whose couch is the thicket, as whales, that plunge into the depths of the oceans.

Verily, Thou art full of infinite favours. There is none other God beside Thee, the Powerful, the Mighty, the Bountiful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Me

O my God, my God! Thou hast given me firm faith, and enabled me to confess Thy unity, and guided me to the words of Thy unity, and inflamed me with the fire of Thy love, and enabled me to offer up my words to Thee and to devote myself to the service of Thy servants and handmaidens, wherefore be glory unto Thee.

O Lord, help me to be humble and obedient, and grant me strength that I may break free from all attachments and cling only to the hem of Thy glory. So that my heart may be filled with Thy love, and that there may be no room for the love of, or attachment to, the world.

O God! Purify me from all else save Thee, cleanse me from my stains, that I may be endued with spiritual qualities and conscience.

Verily, Thou art the Merciful, verily, Thou art the most generous of those to whom mankind turneth for aid.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: O God! My prayer, my hearing. A lamp, a light, to Thee I turn. Thou art Good and Majestic.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Thou art glorified, O Lord, my God! By Thy name, the Opener of the Way, I beg Thee to keep us safe from the malevolence of Thine adversaries who deny Thy covenant and dispute Thy beauty.
By Thy name, the Conqueror, subdue those who have wronged Thy former Manifestation who now appeareth invested with Thy title, the Most Glorious.
By Thy name, the Chastiser, seize those who have treated Thy Cause with contempt, derided Thy mighty words, and are unable to attain unto this most exalted station.
By Thy name, the Victorious, enable Thy loved ones to triumph over Thine enemies and over the infidels among Thy creatures.
By Thy name, the Divider of the Heart, tear away the veil that concealeth the deeds of those who have dishonoured Thee and undermined Thy faith among Thy people.
By Thy name, the Saviour, heal the broken hearts of those who love Thee and vouchsafe to bless them in their undertakings.
By Thy name, the All-Knowing, teach them the wonders of Thy wisdom, that they may cleave steadfastly unto Thy faith and walk in the paths of Thy good-pleasure.
By Thy name, the Protector, protect them from the tyranny of the oppressor, the perfidy of the wicked, and the malice of the troublemakers.
By Thy name, the Protector, shelter them within the fortress of Thy might and power, that they may be safe from the arrows of doubt shot by those who rebel against Thee.
By Thy name, blessed above all names, the Object of Thy favour and the Revealer of Thy beauty, hallow for Thy servants these days that the pen of Thy decree hath clearly mentioned and that are predetermined in Thy irrevocable Tablet, according to Thy will and Thy wisdom.
And by Thy name, the Conqueror, subject the inhabitants of Thy kingdom to Thy law, that all may turn their faces toward Thee and relinquish all in their love for Thee, and for Thy good-pleasure.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
All friends of God ... must contribute to the funds, to the extent possible, however modest their offering may be. God does not charge a soul beyond its capacity. Such contributions must come from all centers and all believers... O friends of God, be assured that through these gifts, your agricultural, industrial, and commercial activities will be blessed with multiple contributions and other bounties. He who performs a good deed shall be rewarded tenfold. There is no doubt that the living God will generously confirm those who expend their riches in His path.

O God, my God, illuminate the faces of Thy sincere lovers and assist them with angelic hosts of assured triumph. Strengthen their steps in Thy way and, in Thy eternal goodness, open to them the doors of Thy blessings, for they expend on Thy path what Thou hast bestowed upon them; they protect Thy faith, call upon Thee with confidence, offer their hearts for love of Thee, and relinquish what they possess, venerating Thy beauty and seeking to please Thee.

O my Lord, grant them an abundant share, the promised and assured reward. Verily, Thou art the Supporter, the Succorer, the Generous, the God of great kindness, the eternal Benefactor.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Compassionate Lord, all these are Thy servants, waiting here for Thy bounty and blessings. O God, establish them upon the intimations of Thy unique Essence. Manifest and reveal the virtues hidden and invisible in these human beings. O God, we are like plants, Thy bounty is like rain; make these plants grow and flourish through the sustenance of Thy generosity. We are all obedient to Thy command. Deliver us from the chains of this worldly life. We are ignorant; make us wise. We are dead; give us life. We are desirous; fill us with inspiration, we are dependent; make us confidants of Thy mystery. We are needy; enrich us with Thy abundant riches. O Lord, fill us with spirit, give us sight, make us hear. Make us acquainted with the mysteries of life. That through this, the secret of Thy glory may be apprehended by us and we may acknowledge Thy greatness, every bounty originating from Thee, every favor being Thine, Thou art Mighty, Powerful, Bountiful, Most Generous.

Whenever a group of people gather in the place of assembly, engaged in the praise of God, and speak to one another about the mysteries of God, verily the breezes of the Holy Spirit shall blow upon them with peace and each one will receive a portion thereof.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O God! My God! With Thy bounteous favour dispel my sorrow and with Thy power assuage my pain. My God! When sorrows gather from all directions, Thou dost behold me turning my face towards Thee. O Lord of all creation and of all within Thy realm, whether seen or unseen! By Thy Holy Name which hath subdued the hearts of men, by the waves of the ocean of Thy mercy, and by the radiance of the Sun of Thy bounty, I beseech Thee to count me among them that have turned their faces towards Thee, for Thou art the Lord of all names and the Creator of the heavens.


My Lord! In Thy days, Thou hast witnessed my afflictions. By the Divine Source of the revelations of Thy Names, and the dawning-place of the splendours of Thy attributes, I pray Thee to ordain for me all that will enable me to serve Thee and to extol Thy virtues. Verily, Thou art the Almighty, the Most Powerful, the Answerer of the prayers of all mankind!


Following this, by Thy countenance, I beg of Thee to bless my undertaking, to clear my debts, and to satisfy my needs. Thy power and Thy sovereignty are witnessed by all, and Thy glory and Thy dominion are confirmed by every understanding heart. There is no God but Thee, the Hearing and Responding God.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Lord my God, Thou art Great! I pray Thee that Thou mayest cleanse from the hearts of Thy servants all that would deprive them of the vision of Thy Countenance, by showering upon them from the clouds of Thy overflowing compassion, so that they may all know Thee. Thou art the Maker and the Creator. O Lord, where every kind of foulness can be separated from the fragrance of the speech that sings the praise of Thy exalted and glorious Name, and even if all that is in heaven and earth is obtained, without even glancing at it, they may experience oneness with Thee, and reach the point where they do not feel like stopping Thy praise, help Thy servants with Thy sovereign power.

O My Beloved, the object of my heart's desire, my prayer to Thee is to protect Thy servant who thirsts for the sight of Thy face from the arrows of atheists and the rods of those who deny Thy truth. O Lord, grant Thy servant the boon that he may surrender himself completely to Thee, proclaim Thy Name, and set his sight upon the sanctuary of Thy manifestation.

Verily, those who long for Thy presence, Thou hast never turned them back from the door of Thy mercy. Thou hast not prevented those who seek Thee from coming to the court of Thy grace; there is no God but Thou. Thou art the Almighty, the Most High, the Remover of difficulties, the Most Glorious, the All-Regulating, the Unfettered.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
I am humble and weak,

My God, my God! Thou dost look upon me with favour. I am humble and weak, yet engaged in the great undertaking of making known Thy word to the people of the world and of proclaiming Thy teachings to Thy people. Were it not for the assistance of Thy Holy Spirit, I could never succeed. Grant that I may obtain victory through the hosts of Thy glorious kingdom. And shower down upon me Thy confirmations, making the moth an eagle, a drop of water a river and sea, an atom a light and the sun. My Lord! Help me with Thy all-conquering power. Then shall my tongue speak Thy praise and glorification to all people, and my soul be filled with the wine of Thy love and knowledge. Verily, Thou art Almighty, and dost whatsoever Thou wilt.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
My God, my Beloved, my King, my Adored One. With what words can I express my gratitude? You have awakened me, who was heedless, and graciously turned me back to You, who had turned away from You.

You have revived me, who was like the dead, with the water of life, and You have revitalized me, who was withered, with the sacred stream of Your Word, flowing from the Pen of the Merciful One.

O Divine Will, all that exists has come forth by Your bounty. I implore that You may not withhold the pure waters of generosity from all things, nor remove all things from the ocean of Your mercy. I entreat You to help and aid me in all circumstances. I beg that Your eternal favor may be bestowed upon me from the heavenly realm of Your grace. Truly, You are the Lord of Bounty and the Sovereign of the eternal Kingdom.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: I implore Thee, O my God, by Thy Name, the splendor of which hath encircled the earth and the heavens, to enable me to subject my will to that which Thou hast ordained in Thy Tablets, so that I may find in myself no desire except what Thou desirest through the power of Thy sovereignty, and no will except what Thou, through Thy will, hast destined for me.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: O my Lord, my hope! Enable Thy loved ones to remain steadfast in Thy supreme, invincible covenant, and to be loyal to Thy manifested Faith, and to follow the precepts of the Book of Thine Effulgences, so that they may become the banners of guidance and the lamps of the Concourse of the Divine Kingdom, the flowing springs of Thine eternal glory, and the stars that guide aright, shining from the Divine Heavens. Verily, Thou art the Unconquerable, the Almighty, the All-Powerful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานเพื่อความมั่นคงในพระปฏิญญา

prayers.text:
O my God! O my God! I thank Thee that Thou dost guide me unto Thee, that Thou dost lead me to Thy horizon, show me Thy path, reveal unto me Thy testimony, and enable me to turn my face toward Thee, whilst most of the learned and the divines among Thy servants, together with all who follow them, turn away without the slightest proof and without any testimony from Thee. Praise be to Thee, O Lord of Names, and glory be to Thee, O Creator of the heavens, that through the power of Thy Name, the Self-Subsistent, Thou dost make me drink of Thy sealed wine, draw me nigh unto Thee, and cause me to recognize the morn of Thy Word, the manifestation of Thy signs, the fountainhead of Thy laws and commandments, the source of Thy wisdom and Thy bounty. Blessed is the land which Thy footsteps have hallowed, whereon the throne of Thy sovereignty standeth, and within which the fragrance of Thy raiment hath spread. By Thy glory and majesty, Thy power and might, I desire naught but my sight that I may behold Thy beauty, and my hearing that I may hearken unto Thy call and Thy verses.

O my God! O my God! Turn not the eyes away from the things for which Thou hast created them, nor prevent the faces from turning toward Thy celestial light, from worshipping at the gates of Thy majesty, from appearing before Thy throne, or from prostrating themselves before the radiant sun of Thy bounty.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Lord! Grant that all peoples may enter the courts of Thy faith, so that none may be shut out from Thy joy.

From time immemorial Thou hast been powerful to do whatsoever Thou wishest, and above all that Thou dost will.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: O my God, my Lord, my Master and my Desire! These are servants who have turned their faces in sincerity toward Thy grandeur and sovereignty, and have purified themselves [3.5s]

O my God! Thou knowest that all men are encompassed by Thy bounty and Thy favour, and are surrounded by Thy trials and Thy tribulations. Every soul is attacked by sickness, and every body is afflicted by suffering, as though it were smitten by the sword of the enemy, and wounded by the dart of his spear. There is no shelter nor refuge for anyone except beneath the wing of Thy protection, Thy custody, Thy guardianship and Thy care.

O Thou, the Merciful! O my Lord! Let Thy protection be my armour, and Thy loving-kindness my shield, and submission to Thy will my stronghold, and Thy care and defence my fortress and my home. Protect me from the suggestions of self and desire, and guard me from every sickness, and tribulation, and hardship, and suffering.

Verily, Thou art the Protector, the Preserver, the Defender, the Controller, and, indeed, Thou art the Merciful of the Merciful!
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God! O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Thy last letter hath reached me, which indicateth thy exceeding love for ‘Abdu’l-Bahá, thy confidence in God, and thy good and sincere intention in the service of the Cause of God. Excellent is the statement given by thee in that precious letter—that ye are in need of love and affinity in that country to unite the hearts and spirits. This is the truth, and naught is there after the truth but manifest error.

Know thou of a certainty that Love is the secret of God’s holy Dispensation, the manifestation of the All-Merciful, the fountain of spiritual outpourings. Love is heaven’s kindly light, the Holy Spirit’s eternal breath that vivifieth the human soul. Love is the cause of God’s revelation unto man, the vital bond inherent, in accordance with the divine creation, in the realities of things. Love is the one means that ensureth true felicity both in this world and the next. Love is the light that guideth in darkness, the living link that uniteth God with man, that assureth the progress of every illumined soul. Love is the most great law that ruleth this mighty and heavenly cycle, the unique power that bindeth together the divers elements of this material world, the supreme magnetic force that directeth the movements of the spheres in the celestial realms. Love revealeth with unfailing and limitless power the mysteries latent in the universe. Love is the spirit of life unto the adorned body of mankind, the establisher of true civilization in this mortal world, and the shedder of imperishable glory upon every high-aiming race and nation.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my God! Thou seest the Sun of Thy word shining upon the horizon of Thy prison-city, for within its walls the Manifestation of Thy being, the Dawn of the light of Thy unity, is raising its voice to praise Thee.
And the sweet fragances of Thy love are spreading over Thy cities and enveloping all the inhabitants of Thy kingdom.
O my God! Since Thou dost reveal Thy grace, suffer not Thy servants to turn away their gaze from it. O my God! Look not upon their state, nor their preoccupations, nor their deeds, but look upon the greatness of Thy glory and the abundance of Thy gifts, the power of Thy might and the excellence of Thy favours. I swear by Thy glory! If Thou shouldst regard them with the eye of justice, all would deserve Thy wrath and the rod of Thy anger. O my God! Hold Thy creatures in the hand of Thy grace and make known unto them that which is best for them in all that Thou hast created in the kingdom of Thy creation.
We testify, O my God, that Thou art God and that there is none other God but Thee. Thou hast existed from all eternity, without equal, without rival, and Thou remainest for ever the same. By the eyes which behold Thee, seated upon the throne of unity, the seat of singleness, I beseech Thee. Aid by Thy Most Great Name all those who love Thee and exalt them to such heights that they may testify, with all their being and with their utterance, that Thou art God alone, the Incomparable, the Unique, the Eternal. Thou art, at all times, without peer or equal. Thou art, in truth, the Most Glorious, the Almighty, Whose succour all men implore.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Prayer for the Dead

O my God! This is Thy servant and the son of Thy servant who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and set his face towards Thee, wholly detached from all except Thee. Thou art, verily, of those who show mercy the most merciful.

Deal with him, O Thou Who forgivest the sins of men and concealest their faults, as beseemeth the heaven of Thy bounty and the ocean of Thy grace. Grant him admission within the precincts of Thy transcendent mercy that was before the foundation of earth and heaven. There is no God but Thee, the Ever-Forgiving, the Most Generous.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Thou kind God! In full humility and submissiveness we pray and beseech at Thy threshold, seeking Thy manifold confirmations and Thy boundless assistance. O Lord! Regenerate these souls and confer upon them a new life. Quicken the spirit, fill the hearts with knowledge, open the eyes and make the ears attentive. From Thy ancient treasury bestow a new existence and a new spirit, and from Thy eternal abode grant them new confirmations.

O God! Verily, the world is in need of reformation. Bestow upon it a new existence. Give it newness of thoughts and reveal unto it heavenly sciences. Breathe into it a fresh spirit and show it a goal more holy and more exalted.

O God! Verily, Thou hast made this century radiant and in it Thou hast manifested the effulgence of Thy mercy. Thou hast banished the darkness of prejudices and hast caused the light of assurance to shine. O God! Grant that these servants may be acceptable at Thy threshold. Reveal a new heaven and spread a new earth for the people to dwell therein. Let the new Jerusalem descend from on high. Bestow new thoughts and a new life upon mankind. Give the souls a new perception and confer upon them new virtues. Thou art, verily, the Almighty, the Powerful. Thou art the Giver, the Generous.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Glory be to God. O my God, how can those who truly love Thee be distinguished without their suffering the troubles that come in Thy path? And how can the station of those who yearn to attain Thy presence be revealed without their enduring the trials that befall them for love of Thee? Thy power is my witness. The companions of all who adore Thee are their tears, the solace of those who seek Thee are their groans, and the sustenance of those who hasten to meet Thee is their broken heart.

How sweet is the taste of death in Thy path, and how precious to me are the arrows of Thy enemies that come to praise Thy Word! O my God, suffer me to drink all that Thou hast willed for me in Thy teachings, and send down upon me all that Thou hast decreed, through Thy grace. By Thy glory! I desire naught but what Thou desirest, and I cherish naught but what Thou cherishest. I offer Thee my absolute confidence and trust.

O my God, I beseech Thee herein. Raise up the pure ones who are worthy of Thy Name and Thy sovereignty to be the helpers of this Revelation, and make them to be mindful of me among Thy creatures, and to unfurl the banners of Thy victory throughout Thy lands.

Thou art indeed able to do whatsoever Thou wishest. There is none other God beside Thee, the Help in all distress, the Self-Subsisting.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
# He is God
My Lord and Supporter of every gathering convened to exalt Thy Name of mercy, and the Inspirer of every band that hath united to serve at the threshold of Thy oneness, I ask Thee by Thy hidden beauty in the realms of Thy Most Glorious Unseen, that Thou mayest encompass these souls with the glances of the eye of Thy mercy, and confirm them with mighty strength, and strengthen their backs with Thy prevailing power that floweth through all things. Verily, Thou art the Hearer of prayer, and Thou art powerful over all things.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O God, may Thou be victorious! How can true lovers be distinguished without enduring the afflictions that come in Thy path? If there are no trials in Thy love, how can the state of those who yearn for Thee be understood? I testify by Thy boundless might! The companions of those who worship Thee are the tears flowing from their eyes, the solace of those who remember Thee is their own sighs, the sustenance of those who are restless to meet Thee is their broken hearts!

On Thy path, how sweet to me is the bitterness of the agony of death! For the proclamation of Thy word, how precious to me are their swords when fighting against enemies! O Lord, in obeying Thy religion, let me taste whatever flavor pleases Thee. On the path of Thy love, give me all that Thou hast destined. I swear by My majesty! Whatever is Thy will, that is my will. Whatever pleases Thee, that pleases me. I have always placed my complete trust in Thee.

O Lord, I implore Thee with folded hands that Thou mayest deliver me, so that these helpers of the Manifestation, worthy of Thy name and sovereignty, may remember me amongst Thy creatures and unfurl Thy banners of victory in Thy land. Thou canst do whatsoever Thou wishest. There is no other God besides Thee. Thou art the Afflictor and the Self-Sufficient.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
The Pacific

O Thou God, the Most Holy and the Almighty! Thou art my Lord, the Most Gracious! Grant us such strength that we may face all kinds of difficulties throughout the world, and permit us to be given a power that will raise the waves of our efforts like the waves of the Pacific Ocean, so that they may reach the shores of the East and the West.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
my Lord, my God, Thou art great! I call on Thee by Thy winds of grace that blow powerfully, and by the Source of Thy purpose and the dawn of Thy inspiration, to rain down upon me and upon all who are eager to behold the face of Thy generosity and to reflect Thy bountiful and all-encompassing mercy, Thy blessings and Thy favors. O my Lord, I am poor and in need. Let me drown in the ocean of Thy riches. I am thirsty; let me drink the living waters of the river of Thy tender mercy.

I implore Thee by Thy name, which Thou hast made the Revealer of Thy countenance, and by Thy wisdom which is spread throughout heaven and earth, to gather all Thy servants under the shade of the tree of Thy merciful decree. Let them eat of its fruit. Let their ears hearken to the murmuring of its leaves and the melodious songs of the celestial birds upon its branches. Thou art, verily, the Help in peril, the Omnipotent, the Most Bountiful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
My God! Praise and glory be to Thee!
For the sighs of them that love Thee, and for the tears of them that turn towards Thee, withhold not from me Thy tenderest mercies in Thy days; and debar me not from hearing the wondrous melody of the Dove of Thine Oneness, as it chanteth its praises before Thy glorious Face.
O God! My plight is pitiable, and Thou seest me clinging to Thy Name, the 'All-Possessor'; I am destined to perish, and Thou seest me inseparable from Thy Name, the 'Unperishing'.
By Thy Name, that hath transcended all names, suffer me not to be separated from Thee, nor to be led into transgression, nor to cast myself down into the abyss of error and vain imaginings. Hold Thou my hand with the hand of Thy power, and deliver me from the depths of delusion and fancy, and remove from me all that Thou dost abhor.
Then, turn me wholly towards Thee, and make me wholly devoted to Thee, and cause me to seek Thy shelter, and to hasten unto Thy Face.
Verily, Thou art powerful to do whatsoever Thou wishest; Thou art able to command whatsoever Thou pleasest. None can stay Thy purpose, nor alter Thy decree.
Thou art, indeed, the Almighty, the Most Glorious, the Generous.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
This verse is recited at the shrine of Abdul Baha, but a person may also recite it for their own sake.

If you offer this prayer with faith and humility, it causes the heart of Abdul Baha to feel delight, as if you are in his presence.

He is Al-Majid.

O God, my God! In humility and prostration, I lift my hands to Thee in supplication, and lay my forehead upon the dust of Thy threshold, which is beyond the knowledge of any knower and the praise of all that glorifies Thy Name. Look with the eye of mercy upon this lowliest of Thy servants who is at Thy door, and immerse him in the ocean of Thy boundless glory.

O Lord! Behold Thy poor and lowly servant begging in prostration, held in Thy hand, praying in ecstasy and acceptance by Thee, his eyes brimming with tears before Thy face. This servant calleth Thee, beseecheth Thee, saying: "O Lord my God, strengthen me in Thy service, illuminate my forehead with the light of worship in Thy holy court, and with the light of prayer in Thy great dominion. Aid me to forsake all before the throne of Thy heavenly door, and to depend wholly on Thy sacred threshold."

O Lord, cause me to drink from the cup of dependence, and grant me its raiment, and immerse me in its ocean. Make me dust upon the path of Thy loved ones, and suffer me to give my life for the land Thou hast hallowed by the footsteps of Thy chosen ones who follow Thy path, O Thou, Lord of glory, in glory.

Through this prayer, Thy servant calleth Thee at dawn and at night. Accept the request of his heart, O Lord! Kindle and fill his heart with joy, and gladden his spirit, that he may do good unto Thy commands and Thy servants.

Thou art the All-Bountiful, the All-Merciful, the Generous, the Compassionate, the Protector.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Lord, my God and my Refuge in the time of my affliction! Forsake me not in my tribulation, O my Protector and my Deliverer! My Guardian and my Saviour in the hour of need and in the day of distress! When I am poor, Thou art my Wealth; when I am weak, Thou art my Strength! Thou art the Removers of the anguish of my heart and the Forgiver of my sins!

Unto Thee do I turn, entreating Thee with all my heart, my mind, and my tongue, turn me away from all that would deny Thy purpose in this generation, in the hallowed bonds of Thy unity, and purify me from all corruption that would prevent me from seeking Thy blessed, pure, and holy Tree.

Have mercy, O Lord, upon the weak, restore the sick, and banish the oppressive.

Enlarge the breasts wherein the fire of Thy love hath blazed, and cause them to be inflamed with the fire of Thy love and Thy heavenly spirit.

Adorn the hallowed temple of unity with the raiment of holiness, and place upon my head the crown of Thy grace.

illumine my face with the rays of Thy countenance, and with Thy grace assist me in performing the service in Thy holy precincts.

Make my heart to overflow with love for Thy creation and suffer me to become a sign of Thy favour, a token of Thy blessing, that fostereth unity amongst Thy loved ones, devoted to Thee, singing Thy praises, and wholly absorbed in Thee.

O God! my God! Deprive me not of the breaths of Thy grace, and withhold not from me the living waters of Thy favour.

Beneath the shadow of Thy divine protection, suffer me to take my rest, and let the eyes of Thy loving-kindness watch over me.

Make my tongue to utter Thy praise amongst Thy people, that my voice may be heard in the great assembly and that from my lips may flow the stream of Thy glorification.

Thou art indeed, the Most Compassionate, the All-Glorified, the All-Powerful, the Most Mighty.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
In the Name of the Merciful God

O Pure God, Thou didst from the beginning make the soil of Iran fragrant, and inspiring, knowledge-conferring, and gem-bestowing. From its East, Thy sun hath always shed light, and in its West, the luminous moon hath appeared. Its country is nurture-loving; its plains, like unto paradise, are full of life-giving flowers and plants; its mountains are full of fresh fruits; and its meadows are the envy of the garden of paradise. Its intellect is the message of the Cherub, and its ebullition like the deep, tumultuous ocean.

There was a time when the fire of its knowledge was extinguished, and the star of its greatness was hidden beneath a veil. Its vernal wind became autumn, and its captivating rose garden became a thorny wilderness. Its sweet spring turned bitter, and its beloved great ones became wanderers, driven from every distant land. Its radiance darkened, and its river became a trickle of water. Until the ocean of Thy bounty surged, and the sun of Thy bestowal dawned. A new spring arrived, the life-giving wind blew, and the rain of Bahman fell. The radiance of that love-nurturing Sun shone forth. The country stirred, the dust-heap became a rose garden, and the black earth became the envy of the orchard. The world became a new world, and its fame spread wide. The plains and mountains became green and verdant, and the birds of the meadow became companions in song and melody. It is a time of joy, a heavenly message, an eternal foundation. Awake, awake!

O Thou Exalted Lord, now a gathering hath been formed, and a group hath united to strive with all their soul, that they may impart a share of that rain of Thy bounty to their companions, and through the power of Thy nurturing, bring up their children in the embrace of intelligence, making them the envy of the learned. They shall teach the heavenly laws and manifest God's bestowal.

Therefore, O Thou Kind Lord, be Thou our strength and support, that they may attain their desires, overlook shortcomings, and make that land a model of the world above.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O seeker of Truth! If thou dost wish that God open the eyes of thy spirit, thou must earnestly ask of God, pray and commune with Him at midnight, and say:

O God, I have turned my face towards the kingdom of Thy oneness and am diving into the ocean of Thy compassion! O God, illumine my sight by showing me the light of Thy countenance in this dark night, and gladden me with the wine of Thy love in this wondrous age. O God, suffer me to hear Thy call, and open before my face the gates of Thy paradise, that I may behold the light of Thy glory and be attracted to Thy beauty.

Verily, Thou art the Giver, the Bountiful, the Merciful, the Forgiver!
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God
O Lord, make these pure and sanctified souls sons of the kingdom and these luminous faces lamps of Thy providence; fill these living hearts with the wine of Thy love and bestow upon these free souls boundless joy and delight through Thy great tidings; make tongues eloquent in Thy remembrance and eyes radiant with the vision of the glories of Thy kingdom.
O Lord, bestow heavenly grace and eternal life, and make these souls victorious and aided with heavenly power, a divine bestowal, merciful attributes, sacred gifts, the attraction of a heart, spiritual gladness, and the confirmation of the Holy Spirit.
Thou art the Mighty, the Glorious, the All-Powerful, and Thou art the All-Knowing, the All-Aware, the All-Seeing.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

fa.cat: محافل روحانی مجامع و جلسات عمومی

prayers.text:
The prayers revealed by 'Abdu'l-Bahá

You are the Lord of exceeding bounty,
You are the Ruler of perfect compassion.

You are the solace of my heart in the morning,
You alone are the observer of my hardships and losses.

The heart that dwells for a moment on Your tribute,
Seeking no friend other than You,
Willfully desires hardships for itself.

I chant Your praise in my heart,
With joy, it desires peril for itself.

The heart that cannot withstand sighing upon seeing You,
Let it wither and be extinguished.

The eye that does not ache to weep upon seeing You,
It is better that it becomes blind before that.
Protect this humble one in the time of intense suffering,
I beseech You, O God, as the All-Powerful.

Let the eternal and delightful Light
Shine brilliantly within me.

Discarding the consideration of worthiness or unworthiness,
You are the merciful Lord, show mercy, O God.

How can a bird with a broken wing fly?
Have mercy and provide a new one, O Lord.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
These people

All praise be to God, my Lord! These are Thy servants, drawn by the breezes of Thy grace, kindled by the fire of Thy oneness, and enlightened by the radiance of Thy glory that shineth from the Mountain of Thy oneness.

O God! Open their mouths, that they may speak of Thee among Thy people, and praise Thee through Thy bounty and Thy mercy, and that they may be aided by Thy hosts, and strengthened in their service to Thee, and become the signs of Thy guidance amongst Thy creatures.

Verily, Thou art the All-powerful, the Most High, the Ever-Forgiving, the Most Merciful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานพื่อการเผยแพร่ศาสนา

prayers.text:
He is God.

O, merciful, beloved Lord in heaven! These companions are those who are intoxicated with the Wine of the Covenant, and who wander through the deserts of Thy love. Their hearts are burning with the fire of separation from Thee, and they earnestly long for the revelation of Thy glory. Reveal unto them from Thy hidden, secret abode, Thy unseen Kingdom, the radiant glory of Thy bounty and grace, and bestow upon them the light of Thy favour and blessings. Send down unto them, moment by moment, new signs of Thy tokens, and manifest unto them the renewed bestowals of Thy grace and favour.

O, Thou Divine Oracle! We are weak, but Thou art All-Powerful. We are like unto ants, but Thou art the King of the Lord of the Glorious Universe. Bestow upon us of Thy favour, and grant us of Thy blessings, that we may set ablaze the flame of Thy love, and its radiant light may shine upon all lands, manifesting Thy might and power. Strengthen our endeavors to bring light into this dark world, and spirituality into this mortal realm. Aid us to be ever active, and not to defile ourselves with the transient things of this life. Help us to set the banquet of Thy divine guidance, to engrave the verses of Thy love with our life-blood, to leave behind fear and peril, to become like trees bearing fruit, and to manifest the perfection of humanity in this fleeting world. Verily, Thou art the Bountiful, the Most Merciful, the Ever-Forgiving, the Pardoner.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานในที่ประชุมหรือที่ชุมนุม

prayers.text: O Merciful Lord! Thou art the Bountiful and the Merciful! We are servants in Thy field and subject to Thy watch and kindness. The sun of Thy help shines on all and the clouds of Thy mercy rain on all. Thy gifts encompass all, Thy help revives all, Thy protection shelters all, and the rays of Thy favour illuminate all. O Lord! Grant us of Thy boundless bestowal and light the lamp of Thy guidance. Enlighten the eyes, gladden the souls, and infuse new spirit into the hearts. Grant them everlasting life. Open the doors of Thy knowledge, let the lamp of faith be kindled. Unite and lead the people to one refuge under the banner of Thy protection, that they may be like the waves of one sea, the leaves and branches of one tree, and may gather under the shade of the same tent. May they drink from the same fountain. May they be revived by the same breeze. May they be enlightened by the same source of light and life. Thou art the Bestower, the Merciful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my Lord! Thy servant is thirsty; Grant them to drink from the fount of Thy tenderness and bounty. They are hungry; grant them the table of Thy gifts. They are naked; clothe them with the raiment of Thy knowledge.

O my Lord! They are the pure, the sincere. Guide them to the field of battle. They are the guides. Grant them to speak with reason and proof. They are the servants who attend. Grant them to offer the cup of assurance to all. O my Lord, make them as nightingales singing praise in the garden, as lions lurking in the thickets, as whales swimming in the deep sea.

Indeed, Thou art the Most Compassionate, the Bountiful, the Ever-Giving. There is no God but Thee.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: Praised be Thou, O my Lord, for Thou hast enabled me to recognize the Manifestation of Thine own Self and helped me to fix my heart upon the court of Thy presence, the object of my soul's adoration. I beseech Thee by Thy name which hath caused the heaven to be rent asunder and the earth to cleave, decree for me that which Thou hast decreed for them that have turned away from all else but Thee and have set their hearts towards Thee. Suffer me to sit in Thy presence upon the seat of truth, within the Tabernacle of Glory. Mighty art Thou to do what Thou wilt. There is no other God beside Thee, the All-Glorious, the All-Wise.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is the Most Glorious
O my God, my Lord, my Support, on Thee is my reliance and my trust, and by the cord of Thy grace I hold fast, and at the gate of Thy Oneness I seek to draw nigh. By the breezes of Thy holiness is the life of my heart, and by the attractions of the beauty of Thy oneness, my soul is moved. And by the shining lights from the horizon of Thy uniqueness is the joy of my spirit, and by the winds of Thy providence, my being is stirred. By the manifestations of the Kingdom of Thy mercy is the resurrection of my self. By the confirmations of Thy Most High assembly is my succour, and the exaltation of my word. By the successes of Thy Most Glorious Kingdom is my victory, and the elevation of my purpose. By Thy love is my salvation, and by the knowledge of Thee is my life. And by Thy help is my steadfastness. By the abundance of the clouds of Thy bounty is the quenching of my thirst. By the pure waters of the fount of Thy grace is the cooling of my burning desire. And by the balm of Thy wisdom is the healing of my sickness.
My God, my God, disappoint not my hopes, nor look upon my deeds, and the evil of my state, and the excess of my abasement, and the extremity of my deprivation, and the abundance of my disobedience. Deal with me, O my God, according to what befitteth the loftiness of Thy glory, and deal not with me according to what befitteth my lowliness, and my poverty, and my helplessness.
My God, my God, the eyes are watching for the descent of Thy gifts. My God, my God, the hearts are awaiting the manifestation of the lights of Thy favours. Strengthen Thou my back with Thy victorious power over all created things, and fortify Thou my loins with Thy prevailing might over all that may be brought into existence. And illumine Thou my sight with Thy shining lights from the dawning-place of the Utterances, and expand Thou my breast with Thy dazzling signs from the ascendant-places of Manifestations. And strengthen Thou my soldiers with Thy triumphant banners raised upon the heights of the hearts of the sanctified, speaking Realities, in the earth and in the heavens.
Verily, Thou art the Almighty to do whatsoever Thou pleasest, and verily, Thou art the Powerful, the Mighty, the All-Wise.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Whosoever journeys in the path of learning to various regions, let him recite in the mountain and the desert, on land and on sea, the following prayer:
O God! O God! Thou seest me, frail and lowly and humble amongst Thy creatures; yet I have trusted in Thee and arisen to promote Thy teachings amongst Thy steadfast servants, relying wholly on Thy power and Thy might!
O Lord! I am as a bird with broken wings, yearning to soar into Thy boundless spheres. How can I possibly do so, save through Thy providence and grace, Thy confirmation and aid!
O Lord! Have mercy on my weakness and strengthen me with Thy power! O Lord! Have pity on my infirmity and support me with Thy might and majesty!
O Lord! When the breath of the Holy Spirit hath confirmed the weakest of all creatures, it shall attain the highest station and possess all that it desireth. Thou hast indeed aided Thy servants in days gone by, and they were the weakest of Thy creatures, the lowest of Thy servants, the most unknown of them that dwelt on the face of the earth; but according to Thy will and through Thy power, they preceded the most glorious of Thy people and the most noble of mankind. They were like unknown moths and became royal falcons; they were like soap-bubbles and became seas. Through Thy gifts, Thy mercy, and Thy greatest favour, they became radiant stars on the horizon of guidance, singing birds in the rose-garden of immortality, roaring lions in the forests of knowledge and wisdom, mighty whales in the oceans of life.
Verily, Thou art the Gracious, the Powerful, the Mighty, and the Most Merciful of all merciful ones.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
ou, Lord of kindness! These souls who love Thee are gathered and intoxicated by Thy love. Thy radiant beauty transports them and Thy musk-scented curls fascinate them. They abandon their hearts to Thee and, humble and defenseless, they wander on Thy path. They forsake friends and strangers alike and cleave to Thine uniqueness, bowing in adoration before Thee.

They belonged to this lower world; Thou didst welcome them into Thy kingdom. They were like withered plants in the desert of deprivation and misfortune; Thou hast made them the young shoots of the garden of knowledge and understanding. Their voices had been silenced; Thou hast made them speak. They were discouraged; Thou hast flooded them with light. They were like arid and parched soil; Thou hast transformed them into a rose garden of profound meanings. They were like children in the world of humanity; Thou hast allowed them to reach celestial maturity.

O Thou, the Bountiful! Grant them a haven and a refuge under Thy protection, and keep them from trials and vicissitudes. Grant them Thine unseen aid and give them Thine unfailing grace.

O Thou, benevolent and beloved Lord! They are like the body and Thou art the Spirit of life. The body depends, for its freshness and beauty, on the grace of the spirit. They therefore need Thy confirmations and aspire to receive the powerful support of the Holy Spirit in this new revelation. Thou art the Mighty. Thou art the Giver, the Benefactor, the Generous, and the Clement. Thou art He who shineth forth from the invisible kingdom.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: O my Lord! Thou seest how they cling to the rope of Thy grace, how they hold fast to the hem of the garment of Thy bounty. Ordain for them that which draweth them nigh unto Thee, and keep them far from all save Thee. I beseech Thee, O Thou King of existence, O Thou Protector of the visible and the invisible, make Thou every one who ariseth to serve Thy Cause to become a sea that surges according to Thy desire, and inflame him with the fire of Thy holy Tree that shineth from the horizon of Thy will. Verily, Thou art the Almighty, Whom neither the power of all the world nor the impetuosity of nations can weaken. There is none other God but Thee, the One, the Incomparable, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานเพื่อบิดามารดา

prayers.text:
O God, raise this new-born in the bosom of Thy love and nourish it with the milk of Thy providence. Nurture this young shoot in the rose-garden of Thy love and water it with the showers of Thy bounty.
Make it a child of the kingdom and guide it to Thy celestial home. Thou art powerful and good. Thou art the Bestower, the Bountiful, the Lord of infinite mercy.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
All friends of God . . . should contribute what they can, however humble that sacrifice may be. God does not lay upon any soul a burden heavier than it can bear. Such contributions must come from all centres and all believers . . . O ye friends of God! Be ye assured that by reason of these contributions, your agriculture, industry and commerce shall receive manifold blessings with favour and bounteous gifts. He that doeth one good deed receiveth a tenfold reward. There is no doubt that the living Lord will abundantly confirm those who give their wealth in His way.
## O God, my God! Illumine the faces of Thy true lovers and make them triumphant with heavenly hosts of certain victory. Make firm their feet on Thy straight path and open to them the gates of Thy gifts with Thy eternal grace; for they spend in Thy ways that which Thou hast given them, guard Thy faith, place their trust in Thy remembrance, sacrifice their hearts for love of Thee, and withhold not aught of that which they possess for adoration of Thy beauty and in their longing to please Thee.
O my Lord! Grant them an abundant share, a destined recompense and a sure reward.
Verily, Thou art the Sustainer, the Helper, the Bountiful, the Ever-Giving.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is the Glory of God
O Merciful, O Compassionate, O Bountiful! East and West are illumined by the lights of the Dawning-Place of Beauty, and the spiritual senses are perfumed by the divine breezes. O God, give Thy servants shelter in the shadow of Thy favour; make the ignorant aware of the mysteries of truth; grant the destitute a refuge and the wanderers a home; gladden the broken-hearted and give wings to the broken-winged birds; let the thirsty drink from the fount of Thy bounty and make the needy independent of the treasure of the kingdom; nourish the children in the cradle of Thy grace until they reach maturity; heal the sick with the heavenly remedy so that they may attain health and well-being.
O God, make the blind to see and the deaf to hear; quicken the dead and revive the withered; make the hopeless hopeful and worthy of all bestowals the deprived; Thou art the Generous, Thou art the Giver, Thou art the Merciful.
O Lord, though we are weak, Thou art powerful; though we are poor, Thou art rich; though we are abased, Thou art exalted. Look not at our poverty and weakness, but rather bestow upon us that which befits Thy absolute riches, power, and might.
Thou art the Merciful, Thou art the Bountiful, Thou art the Generous, Thou art the Compassionate.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O, my Lord! O, my Lord! Behold, a bird with broken wings whose flight hath been stayed; help it to rise unto the shores of prosperity and salvation, that it may follow Thy path with the utmost joy and happiness, through the boundless spaces, and its song in adoration of Thy Most Great Name may be shed upon all regions of the world, gladdening the ears through its summons and enlightening the eyes that recognise the signs of Thy guidance.

O, my Lord! I am humble and alone. I have no helper but Thee, no refuge save Thee, no comforter save Thee. Confirm me in Thy service, aid me with the hosts of Thine angels, make me victorious in the promulgation of Thy Word, and suffer me to diffuse Thy wisdom amongst Thy creatures. Verily, Thou art the Helper of the poor and the Defender of the humble, and, verily, Thou art the Almighty, the All-Powerful, the Unconstrained.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
* Bahá'u'lláh ordains in the 'Kitáb-i-Aqdas' that this prayer shall be recited, in its entirety, for the deceased at a Bahá'í burial. It is read before the interment of a person while the others stand.


O my God! This is Thy servant and the son of Thy servant who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and turned his face toward Thee, entirely detached from all except Thee. Verily, of those who show mercy, Thou art the Most Merciful.

Deal with him, O Thou Who art the forgiver of men's sins and the concealer of their faults, as befits the heaven of Thy bounty and the ocean of Thy grace. Suffer him to enter the gates of Thy all-encompassing mercy, which hath existed before the foundation of earth and heaven was laid. There is no God but Thee, the Ever-Forgiving, the Most Bountiful.

Then let him repeat the greeting 'Alláh-u-Abhá' six times, and then repeat each of the following sentences nineteen times:

Verily, we all worship God. Verily, we all bow down to God.

Verily, we are all devoted unto God.

Verily, we all praise God. Verily, we all thank God.

Verily, we are all patient in God.


*(If the deceased is a woman, let him say: "This is Thy handmaid and the daughter of Thy handmaid, etc.")
*(The Universal House of Justice clarifies in a letter dated July 1, 2001, that the repetition of the sentences proceeds as follows: 'Alláh-u-Abhá' [once], 'Verily, we all worship God.' [19 times], 'Alláh-u-Abhá' [once], 'Verily, we all bow down to God.' [19 times], and so on.)
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my Lord, my Helper, the Answerer of all my needs! Thy servant is come to repose in the shadow of Thy mercy, to alight beneath the cupola of Thy favour, and to ask for Thy gifts and Thy favours.

I beg of Thee, O my Lord, with Thine eye that slumbereth not, to turn away my gaze from all that is not Thyself. Strengthen Thou my sight, that I may behold Thy signs, and be guided to the lights of Thy countenance. Thou art He whose might hath encompassed all that hath been created.

There is no God but Thou, the Opener, the Victorious, the All-Knowing.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is the All-Baha

Forgiver and Merciful, these pure souls have been freed from the prison of dust and have flown to Thy world. They were good-natured and captivated by Thy Face and thirsty for Thy stream. In the time of their lives, they were revived by the breath of the All-Merciful. They found a seeing eye, they had a hearing ear. They were free from every attachment and were always joyous and delighted by Thy favors. Now they have flown to the world of mystery and in the proximity of Thy mercy, they build nests and abodes upon the Tree of Tuba and engage in song and melody. O Lord, forgive the sins of these souls and raise them from the pit to the zenith of the moon. Guide them into the rose-garden of Thy bounties and grant them refuge in the meadow of Thy forgiveness and pardon. Make them the lords of the free and bring them into the circle of the near ones. Comfort those who remain and grant them ease, and make them the adornment of the created world, that they may engage in Thy praise and in Thy glorification and sanctification. Thou art the All-Forgiving, Thou art the All-Pardoning, Thou art the Forgiver and the Merciful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
The Most Holy, the Most Inaccessible, the Most Great.
The Feast of the Birth has come, and the Beauty of God, the Almighty, the Mighty, the Loving, has established Himself upon the throne. Blessed is he who is present this day before the Face, and to whom the Eye of God, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting, has turned. Say: We took the Feast in the Greatest Prison after what the kings rose up against us. Let not the might of any oppressor prevent us, nor shall the hosts of sovereignty disturb us. This is what the Merciful has testified in this Praiseworthy Station. Say: Does the essence of tranquility become disturbed by the clamor of possibility, nay, by His effulgent Beauty upon all that was and all that shall be? This is the might of God, which has encompassed all things, and this is His dominant power over all that is witnessed and all that is beheld. Cling to the cord of might, then remember your Chosen Lord in this dawn wherein all hidden unseen has shone forth. Thus has the Tongue of Eternity spoken on this day wherein the Sealed Nectar has been released. Beware lest the delusions of those who have disbelieved in God disturb you, or suspicions prevent you from this outstretched path.

O People of Splendor! Fly with the pinions of detachment in the atmosphere of the love of your Merciful Lord, then assist Him with what has been revealed in a Preserved Tablet. Beware lest you dispute with any of the servants; rather, manifest through the fragrance of God and His exposition, by which all faces are directed. Verily, those who are heedless this day are in a drunkenness of desire, and they comprehend not. Blessed is he who turns to the dawning-place of his Lord's signs with submission and repentance. Verily, thou art He who arises among the servants, then reminds them of what has been revealed in the Book of their Noble, Chosen Lord. Say: Fear God, and follow not the delusions of those who have pursued every sinful doubter. Turn with luminous hearts to the direction of your Lord's Throne, the Possessor of Names. He shall indeed support you with Truth. There is no god but He, the Mighty, the Bountiful. Do you hasten to the pool, and the Greatest Ocean?
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Lord my God! We are weak, but Thou art the Lord of Power. We are pitiable, but Thou art the Most Mighty, the Most Glorious. We are poor, but Thou art the Lord of all Wealth, the Most Generous. Aid us with Thy boundless grace to serve at Thy Holy Threshold, and with the power of Thy favour and grace support and uphold us as we worship Thee in the places where Thy praise shall flow forth. Help us to spread Thy holy fragrance among Thy creatures, and strengthen our bodies to serve Thee among Thy devoted servants. That we may guide all nations towards Thy Most Great Glory, and call all peoples to the shores of the wondrous ocean of Thy unity.

O Lord of Heaven! Deliver us from the fetters of the earth and its peoples, from the sins and iniquities of past ages, and from the tribulations of the future, so that we may with exceeding joy and radiant gladness proclaim and spread abroad only Thy Word, and rejoice in praising Thee day and night, call all peoples to the path of guidance, charge them to adhere to uprightness and justice, and become the singers of Thy praises among all Thy creatures. Thou art able to do whatsoever Thou pleasest. Verily, Thou art the Almighty, the All-Powerful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God.
O Thou the Goal of all desire, we thank Thee that our eyes have been illumined by beholding Thee, and our hearts and souls have become envious of the rose-garden and meadow through the breezes of Thy holiness. The breezes of fellowship have been felt, and the breaths of the Holy Spirit have been diffused, the soul hath reached the Beloved, and the heart hath found its way to the presence-chamber, and hath become aware of the hidden secret and the guarded sign.
O Lord, give us shelter in the ark of Thy protection, and grant us a refuge and sanctuary in the stronghold of Thy favour.
O Kind One, if Thou dost favour, it is the essence of faithfulness and the reality of bounty; and if Thou dost chastise, it is deserving of punishment and injustice. Bestow freely whatsoever is worthy of Thy Threshold, and make abundant whatsoever is meet for the realities. Graciously make the lowly, through Thy pure gift, the honored ones of the Kingdom, and the abject, through Thine utmost mercy, the manifestors of the bounty of the Godhead.
O Lord, preserve, keep safe, that the foot may not slip, and fall into the lowest depths. Thou art the Almighty, the Glorious, the Capable; Thou art the Knower, the Seer, the Wise. Verily Thou art the Ever-Forgiving, the Most Merciful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God!
O Lord! This assemblage hath gathered in this meeting out of pure love and with utmost unity and accord. O God! Illumine the faces, gladden the spirits with the Great Glad-Tidings, brighten the eyes with the beholding of the signs of guidance, and make the ears to delight in hearkening to the Call from on high. O Lord! We are all sinners; do Thou forgive us. We are all full of faults; do Thou pardon us. Grant us Thy shelter, and through Thy forgiveness, make our shortcomings perfect. Deliver these souls from the world of illusions and guide them to the Truth, that they may search after reality, be distanced from the world of dust, and draw nigh unto the Kingdom. May they be freed from this darksome world and be joined to the world of light. Thou art the Powerful, the Mighty, the Giver, the Kind.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

fa.cat: محافل روحانی مجامع و جلسات عمومی

prayers.text:
O my Lord, my Defender, my Help in peril! With utmost lowliness I beg of Thee; sick, I turn to Thee, hoping for Thy healing; to Thee I cry, humbly, with speech, soul and spirit:
O God, my God! The darkness of the night hath enveloped all regions, and the entire earth is veiled in dense clouds. The peoples of the world are submerged in the dark depths of vain illusions, while their tyrants swim in cruelty and hatred. I see naught but the gleam of devouring, burning fires that rise from the bottom of the abyss; no sound reaches my ears save the deafening roar produced by the rumbling of thousands upon thousands of attacking firearms, whilst every plague exclaims, in a loud voice, in its secret tongue: "My riches are of no avail to me, and my sovereignty hath perished!"
O my Lord! The lamps of guidance have been extinguished. The flames of passion surge to the heights, and malevolence is continually gaining ground in the world. Malice and rancor have spread over the face of the earth, and I find no soul save Thy own companions, oppressed and scarce, who raise this cry:
Hasten ye at once to love! Hasten ye at once to fidelity! Hasten ye to bestow gifts! Come ye to be guided!
Come ye to harmony! Come ye to behold the sun! Come ye hither to kindness, to well-being! Come ye hither to friendship and peace!
Come ye and cast down your weapons of wrath, until unity be achieved! Come ye, and on the true path of the Lord, let us help one another!
These Thy downtrodden ones, verily, with extreme joy, in body and soul, sacrifice their lives for the whole of humanity, in all regions. Thou seest them, O my Lord, weeping the tears shed for Thy people, afflicted by the pain of Thy children, pitying humankind, suffering by virtue of the calamities that beset all the inhabitants of the earth.
O my Lord! Endow them with the wings of victory, that they may soar to the heavens of salvation; strengthen them in the
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
My Lord, My Adored One, My King, My Desire! What tongue can recount My gratitude to Thee? I was heedless, Thou didst awaken me. I turned away from Thee, by Thy grace Thou didst help me to turn towards Thee. I was like unto the dead, Thou didst bring me back to life with the water of life. I was withered, Thou didst revive me with the heavenly river of Thy words that flowed from the Pen of the Most Compassionate.
O Thou, the Almighty God! All this hath come to pass through Thy bounty! Suffer him not to be removed from the ocean of Thy munificence, nor to be kept back from the sea of Thy mercy. I implore Thee to help and assist me at all times, and to grant me Thy ancient favours from the heaven of Thy mercy. Verily, Thou art the All-Bountiful and the Everlasting King.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God

O Lord, O merciful Creator, Thy servants are scattered and dispersed and distressed in the regions and quarters, wandering without aim or provision, in every breath ensnared in a trap, and in every day wandering in a land, they find solace in Thy remembrance and are aflame in the fire of Thy love, they are bewildered in Thy street and dishevelled in face and form. Bestow Thy favour, grant Thy grace, that all may be gathered together in the extended shade and the glorious tent, under the banner of the desired goal, and seated upon couches, facing each other, and drink from the cup of Thy bestowal and be intoxicated with the wine of Thy favour, Thou art the Able, the Powerful.

O Lord, protect these shining lamps from the winds of trial and tribulation, and grant a resting-place in the garden of Thy grace to these birds with broken wings, grant a portion to these dispossessed, and bestow a cure upon these helpless ones. Thou art the Generous, Thou art the Merciful, and Thou art the All-Knowing.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God! O Thou Almighty Lord! Strengthen all mankind that they may do according to the instructions and teachings recorded in these writings, so that wars and strifes may be eliminated from the world of man; that the roots of enmity may be destroyed and the foundations of love and affection be established; that the hearts may be filled with love and the souls be attracted; that wisdom may advance and the faces become brightened and illumined; that there be no more wars and strifes and that reconciliation and peace appear; that the Unity of the world of man may pitch its tent on the “apex of the horizons,” so that peoples and parties become as one nation, that different continents become as one continent and the whole earth as one land; that the sects of antagonizing and dogmatic religions be unified; that the world of creation be adorned and all the people of the earth abide in unity and peace.

Verily, Thou art the Giver, the Bestower, the Beholder!
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Kind, Forgiving, and Radiant Lord of earth and heaven,
we are all gathered, yearning for You,
needy, Your dervishes,
helpless wanderers and distraught fallen ones,
dejected, withered ones,
in pain, grant healing,
ailing, bestow a remedy,
disheartened, give us a flame,
withered, scatter a glimmer,
strangers, make us known (to You),
make us moths burnt by the candle of faithfulness,
thirsty and steeped in heart's blood, bring forth a delightful spring and let us drink from the water of life,
cast commotion in the city and spread a tumult in the universe, so that hearts may become astonished by You and souls may be sacrificed to You.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

fa.cat: محافل روحانی مجامع و جلسات عمومی

prayers.text:
He is the Glory.
O Thou forgiving God, O Thou the Bountiful! These souls, like birds of swift wing, have been freed from the snares of the earthly world and have taken their flight unto the heavenly kingdom; they have escaped from the nest of dust and have flown to the abode of the pure world. They cherish the hope that in the luminous rose-garden of the world above they may find their dwelling-place upon the cypress of the paradise garden and abide in the palace of forgiveness.

O Thou kind Lord! Guide every pure soul to the Divine threshold, and honour every helpless suppliant within Thy blessed paradise; cast them into the ocean of Thy bounty and generosity, and suffer them to behold Thy radiant countenance. Thou art the Giver, the Bestower, the Forgiver, and the Merciful. Alláh-u-Abhá
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God

O God, O Forgiver of error, O Remover of transgressions and iniquities, Thou forgivest whom Thou willest by Thy vast mercy and Thy radiant compassions. Verily, I supplicate unto Thee with all shame and bashfulness for the errors that have issued from me. Nevertheless, I beg of Thee to pardon these, and to forgive their sins, and to shelter them within the precincts of Thy great mercy.

O Lord, they have none but Thee; none can succor them but Thee; none can save them but Thee.

O Lord, have mercy upon them by Thy grace and Thy favors; draw them out from the abyss of deprivation, and deliver them from the pit of estrangement; and cause them to enter the Paradise of contentment, and bestow upon them the chalice of forgiveness and bounty.

Verily, Thou art the Gentle, the Merciful, the Compassionate. and Thou art the Forgiving, the Loving, the Helper.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is the Glory of the Most Glorious
O kind Lord, make these Thy servants detached from stranger and kin, and make them intimate with the breezes of the garden of Thy Abhá Kingdom; illuminate the eyes with the vision of Thy lights, and make the souls a garden and meadow; make the hearts a garden of faithfulness, and the breasts a source of divine blessings from the Supreme Concourse. Bestow abundantly the grace of the Holy Spirit, and grant freely the power of the Faithful Spirit, so that Thy friends may arise in Thy service with heavenly strength, with divine power, with majestic might, with heavenly confirmation, with celestial hosts, with a divine breath, with a lordly gift, with the luminous hand of Moses, with the breath of Christ, with the intimacy of Abraham, with the love of the Beloved, with the beauty of Joseph, with the longing of Jacob, and the patience of Job.
O Lord, grant them success in this endeavor; verily, Thou art the Powerful, the All-Glorious.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is the All-Glorious!

O pure God, O loving Lord! These companions are captivated by Thy fragrance and bewildered in Thy path. They have freed themselves from every bond and joined themselves to Thy love. They are detached from the world and its people, and are enthralled and ensnared by Thy love. They seek no cure for any pain but Thy grace, and no balm for any wound but in Thy path. They ever desire Thy endless forgiveness and crave Thy boundless favors.

O Kind Bestower! Ennoble these Thy lowly ones and make these captives of Thy love to be princes. Raise them to the highest heaven, and in their self-sacrifice, establish them upon the throne of eternal glory.

Thou art the Powerful, the Mighty, the All-Seeing, the All-Hearing.

Praise be to Thee for that which Thou hast guided us to, and thanks be to Thee for that which Thou hast fulfilled. We praise Thee and thank Thee for Thy bounty, and we supplicate Thee every morning and evening.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

fa.cat: محافل روحانی مجامع و جلسات عمومی

prayers.text:
He is the Glory of God

O Lord, O Thou All-Knowing, O Thou Merciful, this servant of Thine has hastened from the utmost regions of the East to the West, so that perhaps the nostrils of these souls may be perfumed by the breaths of Thy favours, the breeze of the garden of guidance may blow over these lands, souls may find themselves receptive to Thy bestowals, hearts may be gladdened by Thy glad tidings, eyes may behold the light of truth, ears may receive their share and portion from the call of the Kingdom.

O Lord, enlighten the hearts, O merciful Lord, make the hearts the envy of the rose garden and the orchard, O unique Beloved, waft the breezes of Thy favour, let the lights of Thy bounty shine, so that hearts may become pure and cleansed, receive their share and portion of Thy confirmations, this gathering may tread Thy path, seek Thy secret, behold Thy face, and adopt Thy character.

O Lord, bestow Thine unending bounties, make the treasure of guidance freely available, so that these helpless ones may find a remedy.

Thou art the Merciful, Thou art the Bountiful, Thou art the Knowing and the All-Powerful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)
(LLM translated)

fa.cat: محافل روحانی مجامع و جلسات عمومی

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานขอความช่วยเหลือ

prayers.text: Behold, O my Lord, my dwelling in the heart of this mountain, and Thou art a witness to my patience. Verily, I have longed for naught but Thy love and the love of them that love Thee. How can I extol the resplendent beauty of Thy Lordship, conscious as I am of my utter nothingness before the effulgence of Thy glory? Yet the anguish of separation and isolation impels me to call upon Thee with this supplication: that perchance Thy faithful servants may become aware of my lamentations, and supplicate Thee for me, and Thou mayest deign to answer their prayers, as a token of grace and favour. I bear witness that there is none other God beside Thee, for Thou art enshrouded in the mantle of sovereignty, greatness, glory, and power, which no one among Thy servants can imagine or comprehend. Behold, by virtue of that which is inherent in Thy Essence, Thou shalt remain eternally inaccessible to all save Thyself.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
All the friends of God... should contribute to the extent possible, however modest their offering may be. God doth not burden a soul beyond its capacity. Such contributions must come from all centers and all believers. . . . O Friends of God! Be ye assured that in place of these contributions, your agriculture, your industry, and your commerce will be blessed by manifold increases, with goodly gifts and bestowals. He who cometh with one goodly deed will receive a tenfold reward. There is no doubt that the living Lord will abundantly confirm those who expend their wealth in His path.

O God, my God! Illumine the brows of Thy true lovers, and support them with angelic hosts of certain triumph. Set firm their feet on Thy straight path, and out of Thine ancient bounty open before them the portals of Thy blessings; for they are expending on Thy pathway what Thou hast bestowed upon them, safeguarding Thy Faith, putting their trust in their remembrance of Thee, offering up their hearts for love of Thee, and withholding not what they possess in adoration for Thy Beauty and in their search for ways to please Thee.

O my Lord! Ordain for them a plenteous share, a destined recompense and sure reward. Verily, Thou art the Sustainer, the Helper, the Generous, the Bountiful, the Ever-Bestowing.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O God! Draw us to Thy love, inflame us with Thy tenderness; satisfy us from the ocean of Thy bounty; assuage our hunger with the riches of Thy eternal grace; and clothe us with Thy glory. The birds of the air and the beasts of the field receive their sustenance each day from Thee, and all living things are nourished by Thy grace and tenderness.

Let not this frail creature be deprived of Thy favour, and strengthen through Thy power this helpless soul with Thy gift.

Give us our daily bread, and multiply Thy gifts for the sustenance of life, that we may not be dependent on aught else save Thee, may commune fully with Thee, may walk in all Thy ways, and declare all Thy mysteries.

Thou art the Almighty and Loving, and the Provider for all mankind.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
It seems there isn't a direct, readily available translation for this specific Hindi prayer. I will proceed with translating it to the best of my ability.

O Merciful Lord! I give thanks unto Thee that Thou hast awakened me, and given me consciousness. Thou hast given me eyes to see, and ears to hear. Thou hast shown me the way of Thy kingdom. Thou hast shown me the true path, and hast granted me entrance into the ark of salvation. O Lord! Make me steadfast and firm in faith. Protect me from severe trials. Grant me protection in the temple of Thy covenant and the fortress of Thy laws. Thou art the All-Seeing, Thou art the All-Hearing. O Thou, the Merciful Lord! Grant me a heart that is like a mirror, illuminated with the light of Thy love, and bestow upon me, through the rain of Thy heavenly grace, such thoughts as will transform this world into a rose garden. Thou art Merciful, Kind, Thou art the Bountiful Lord.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Thou the Glory of the Most Glorious.

    O Lord, O Merciful! These friends are attached to the threshold of Thy presence, and these companions are flames burning in the fire of Thy love, like a surging sea in Thy remembrance, and like a lamp shining in the assembly of Unity.

    Each one is a wave of Thy sea of mercy, each one a small casket of the pearl of guidance.

    Every morning they weep earnestly with an open heart, and every night they fall asleep in remembrance of Thy Countenance.

    Thou art Forgiving, Merciful, and Thou art Eternal and Most Compassionate.

    Show mercy to those who have departed, grant patience to those who remain.

    Forgive transgressions and pardon sins.

    Thou art the Concealer, Thou art the Bestower; and upon you be the Glory.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God

O Lord, this pure soul turned its attention unto Thy kingdom and made supplication and plea. While it was a captive of the material world, it intended to enter the kingdom of permanence and turned its attention toward the spiritual world, hoping for Thine infinite favours.

O Forgiver, forgive the sin and bestow pardon and forgiveness. Lead this thirsty one to the spring of life and plunge this fish into the boundless ocean of Thy forgiveness, that this bird may wing its way to the divine rose-garden and enter the infinite gardens of Thy pardon and forgiveness.

Thou art indeed the Forgiving, the Generous, the Merciful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Merciful Lord, illuminate the hearts with the light of the Most Great Guidance, quicken the souls with the Most Great Glad-Tidings, brighten the eyes with the vision of Thy lights, make the ears attentive to the hearing of Thy call, cause us to enter Thy hallowed kingdom and to be revived by the breaths of the Holy Spirit, grant eternal life, bestow heavenly perfections.
O Lord, sacrifice our souls unto Thee, and bestow upon us a new spirit, grant heavenly strength, bestow eternal joy, make us successful in the service of the world of humanity, and be the cause of unity amongst hearts.
O Lord, awaken us from slumber and make us wise and vigilant, that we may comprehend the mysteries of Thy holy book and grasp the secrets of Thy words.
Thou art Powerful, Thou art the Giver, Thou art the Merciful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God
O Lord, make this sinner weary of all save Thee, and enamoured of Thy love; release him from the chains and snares of desire and passion, and cast him into the snare of the love of the Beauty of El-Abhá, so that I may forget all that is other than Him, and become intoxicated and enraptured by the wine of Thy love. O Lord, I am ignorant and entangled in my own imaginings; provide a remedy and save this fallen one from the lower self, which whispers temptations every moment and sets a new snare with every breath. O Lord, Thou art the Savior and the Liberator; provide a remedy with Thy holy breaths, that perchance this heart may be freed from the world of water and clay, and soar in the heights of Divine Mercy, and find rest in the spirit of detachment.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is God
O Lord, bestow upon Thy yearning servants the effulgence of Thy favour and open wide the doors of Thy bestowal. Purify them from every impurity and cleanse them, and deliver them from all unworthiness. Perfume their garments like the tunic of Joseph, and fill their character and their dispositions with musk and ambergris like the pouch of the morning breeze.
